Choose your AI career path

Each roadmap is built around a specific role — so you learn exactly what you need to become job-ready, nothing more, nothing less.

Featured Roadmap

AI Automation Specialist

Get a feel for how the roadmap is structured. Phase 1 is completely free — no account required to start.

1

Phase 1: AI Foundations

Free

Understand what AI is, how modern AI tools work, and how they fit into real business workflows. No prior experience needed.

2

Phase 2: Automation Tools

Premium

Unlock full access to view lessons, projects, and quizzes in this phase.

3

Phase 3: Workflow Design

Premium

Unlock full access to view lessons, projects, and quizzes in this phase.

4

Phase 4: API & Integration Basics

Premium

Unlock full access to view lessons, projects, and quizzes in this phase.

5

Phase 5: Portfolio Projects

Premium

Unlock full access to view lessons, projects, and quizzes in this phase.

Start Free PreviewUnlock Full Roadmap

How it works

From zero to job-ready in four clear steps.

01

Choose your target AI role

Browse 10+ AI career paths and select the role that matches your goals, background, and available time.

02

Follow a structured roadmap

Work through phase-by-phase lessons built specifically for your chosen role — no guesswork, no filler content.

03

Build real portfolio projects

Every roadmap includes hands-on projects you can showcase to employers or clients as proof of your skills.

04

Track progress and become job-ready

Monitor your progress, complete quizzes, add personal notes, and finish fully prepared for the job market.

Simple, transparent pricing

Start for free. Upgrade when you're ready to go deeper. Final pricing will be announced at launch — join the waitlist to get early access pricing.

Free Preview

Free

  • Browse all career roles
  • Preview roadmap structure
  • Access Phase 1 of any roadmap
  • Limited progress tracking
Get Started Free
